name: jsonplaceholder-api-load-test
description: Basic JSONPlaceholder API load testing project using k6, Prometheus, Grafana, and Docker Compose.

scripts.test:grafana: cross-env K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:9090/api/v1/write K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_TREND_STATS="p(95),p(99),min,max" k6 run -o experimental-prometheus-rw --tag testid=jsonplaceholder-local tests/jsonplaceholder-api-load-test.js
